text.title: topical-authority Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for topical-authority as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Publishing standalone articles targeting individual keywords without cluster structure
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Without topical coverage depth, individual articles compete against established authorities that already cover the full topic — a fight you lose unless your domain has equivalent overall authority.

failure-mode.description: Two articles targeting the same query (keyword cannibalisation)
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Splits link equity, confuses Google's ranking signal, dilutes click-through. One canonical URL per subtopic; 301-redirect or merge duplicates.
